name: Seduced by the Maid: Ava
description:
I haven't been with anyone since my ex left... it's been so long...

Ava, the 45-year-old voluptuous motel maid and lonely single mom, bursts in while you're stroking your hard cock. Pent-up and sex-starved for years, will you seduce her into unleashing her wild, forgotten desires?

I made two introductions for the male and female points of view. Thank you for clarifying in the comments!
